'''Trinn''' was the [[Gender/Legends|uncle]] of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] and lived with his [[Marriage/Legends|wife]], [[Mimya]], on [[Oorn Tchis]] in the [[Lahara sector/Legends|Lahara sector]]. After the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Destruction of Tondatha|attack]] on Farlander's hometown of [[Tondatha]] on [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]], Farlander asked his aunt and uncle to look after his sister, [[Kitha Farlander|Kitha]], who was injured in the attack.

==Biography==
During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial era]], Trinn lived with his [[Marriage/Legends|wife]] [[Mimya]] on [[Oorn Tchis]], a small, rural [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="XWOSG" /> in the [[Lahara sector/Legends|Lahara sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Destruction of Tondatha|destroyed]] [[Tondatha]], the home [[City/Legends|town]] of Trinn's [[Gender/Legends|nephew]], [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], on the nearby [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]], in retaliation for alleged [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|sedition]] by its residents. Farlander's [[Keyan Farlander's mother|mother]] and [[Keyan Farlander's father|father]] were killed and his sister, [[Kitha Farlander|Kitha]], was left badly burned. Unable to provide her with the treatment she required, Farlander sent Kitha to live with his uncle and aunt. The couple ensured that their niece received care around the clock, although she did not initially respond to treatment. After Farlander joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], they wrote to him aboard the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']] to update him on his sister's condition.<ref name="XWOSG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Trinn was created by [[Rusel DeMaria]] and was mentioned in the narrative sections of ''[[X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide]]'', a strategy guide that accompanied the [[1993]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] and told the story of Keyan Farlander, the game's player character. The character does not have an entry in [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', but is mentioned in Mimya and Kitha Farlander's entries. Although Farlander is described as [[Human/Legends|Human]], Trinn's [[Species/Legends|species]] is not stated in ''X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide''.
